primary.register: Thin clean vector outlines, editorial precision, Pilot.com consulting-grade. Flat shapes. Muted Mentis palette.
primary.register_rationale: Matches Pilot.com benchmark. Scales cleanly at both LinkedIn-post size (1200x1200) and hero/showcase size. Reads 'direct, rigorous, quietly confident'. Native SVG output, no raster quality loss.
useFor: All 10 Phase 2 illustrations (hero, process, three-layer-system, signal-detection, team-at-work, outcome, consultation, proposal, weekly-report, partnership)

discarded.reason: Raster with grain drifts from Pilot.com benchmark — reads Intercom/Notion rather than consulting-grade. Soft when scaled. Replaced by 01-v2.
Clay/3D aesthetic undercuts rigour signal. Warmer/feature moments will be covered by Nano Banana Pro photography instead.

rules.default: Every illustration generation in Phase 2 MUST pass styleID='b143416b-1c5c-4e7b-9598-d68262969f98' to mcp__recraft__generate_image. Do NOT vary this ID.
rules.palette_steering: Downstream prompts MUST include explicit Mentis palette cues: 'Deep Space Blue #1A3A5C, Crayola Blue #2878E8, Alice Blue #F2F6FB background, Sky Reflection #8AABC8 mid-tone, Harvest Gold #D4980F accent only (<5%). NO orange, NO coral, NO peach, NO warm skin-tone clothing.' Recraft styles drift from palette without explicit cues.
rules.no_improvisation: If a scene doesn't fit this style, stop and ask the user. Do not create additional styles.
